source_section.title_label_raw: Built Form and Siting Requirements within the CDD-2 and CDD-1 Zones Applicability

sections.title_label_raw: Siting Requirements within the CDD-2 and CDD-1 Zones Applicability

provisions.heading_context_raw: Siting Requirements within the CDD-2 and CDD-1 Zones Applicability
provisions.text: With the exception of main buildings within a heritage conservation district, any main building erected, constructed, reconstructed, altered, or located, or an addition to any main building, within a CDD- 2 or CDD-1 zone shall meet the built form and siting requirements of this Chapter. Maximum Building Height

sections.title_label_raw: Subject to Section 103 and Part X, any main building shall not exceed

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Section 103 and Part X, any main building shall not exceed
provisions.text: Subject to Section 103 and Part X, any main building shall not exceed the maximum required building height specified on Schedule 15. Minimum Front or Flanking Setbacks

sections.title_label_raw: Subject to Subsections 320(2), any portion of a main building,

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsections 320(2), any portion of a main building,
provisions.text: Subject to Subsections 320(2), any portion of a main building, either above or below grade, shall have a minimum required front or flanking setback as specified on Schedule 18.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsections 320(2), any portion of a main building,
provisions.text: If a minimum required front or flanking setback has not been specified on Schedule 18, the minimum required front or flanking setback shall be 3.0 metres. Side Setback Requirements

sections.title_label_raw: The minimum required side setback for any main building shall

provisions.heading_context_raw: The minimum required side setback for any main building shall
provisions.text: The minimum required side setback for any main building shall be:

provisions.heading_context_raw: The minimum required side setback for any main building shall
provisions.text: where a lot line abuts a lot, any portion of which, is zoned HR-2, HR-1, ER-3, ER-2, ER-1, CH-2, CH-1, INS, PCF, or RPK zone, 10.0 metres from the side lot line abutting the lot; or (RCCC-Sep 4/24;E-Apr 17/25)

provisions.heading_context_raw: The minimum required side setback for any main building shall
The minimum required side setback for any main building shall
provisions.text: There is no maximum required side setback. Rear Setback Requirements

sections.title_label_raw: The minimum required rear setback for any main building shall be:

provisions.heading_context_raw: The minimum required rear setback for any main building shall be:
provisions.text: The minimum required rear setback for any main building shall be:

provisions.heading_context_raw: The minimum required rear setback for any main building shall be:
provisions.text: where a lot line abuts a lot, any portion of which, is zoned HR-2, HR-1, ER-3, ER-2, ER-1, CH-2, CH-1, INS, PCF, or RPK zone, 10.0 metres from the rear lot line abutting the lot; or (RCCC-Sep 4/24;E-Apr 17/25)

provisions.heading_context_raw: The minimum required rear setback for any main building shall be:

sections.title_label_raw: Subject to Subsection 323(2), the maximum required lot

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 323(2), the maximum required lot
provisions.text: Subject to Subsection 323(2), the maximum required lot coverage shall be 50%.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 323(2), the maximum required lot
provisions.text: One accessory structure per lot, which has a footprint that is no greater than 20.0 square metres, shall be exempted from the maximum required lot coverage calculation. Minimum Separation Distances

sections.title_label_raw: Where more than one main building is permitted on a lot in

provisions.heading_context_raw: Where more than one main building is permitted on a lot in
provisions.text: Where more than one main building is permitted on a lot in Subsection 89(3), a minimum required separation distance of 4.0 metres shall be provided between main buildings.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Where more than one main building is permitted on a lot in
provisions.text: Where more than one portion of any main building protrudes above grade, a minimum required separation distance of 4.0 metres shall be provided between the above grade portions. Accessory Structures

sections.title_label_raw: Accessory structures shall meet the requirements of Part V, Chapter

provisions.heading_context_raw: Accessory structures shall meet the requirements of Part V, Chapter
provisions.text: Accessory structures shall meet the requirements of Part V, Chapter 19.
